description:
REQ-029 Phase 2: When a SkillVersionRecord's artifact field is a URL (https://), add an HTTP download step in handle_install() that fetches the artifact to .ao/state/skills/artifacts/, verifies the integrity hash, and records the local path. For MCP server skills, generate the appropriate transport config (stdio/SSE/HTTP) based on skill metadata.

Depends on the skill search HTTP fetch task being done first.

Key files: crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/operations/ops_skill.rs
title: Implement artifact download in ao skill install
